examples: My grip on the control bar was painfully tight as I ran down the lip of the dune.
Between the shore and the inland edge of the dune field, sand alternates with the vegetated ground.
My LED headlamp lit the white sand dune.
Gradually, the mound gets larger, kills the plant, develops into a dune, and roams the desert for eternity.
One was a cross between a Tesla Roadster and a doorless dune buggy.
